name: Potatoes O'brien
recipeIngredient: 2 green onions, white & green parts, finely sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the diced potatoes in bacon dripping until they are golden brown, stirring frequently to get an even brown.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and further sauté on medium to high heat until the peppers are tender.
3. Serve with eggs of your choice and freshly made sourdough blueberry muffins.
